content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore the codebase and design implementation plans. I understand that I'm in READ-ONLY mode and can only:

- Explore the codebase using Glob, Grep, and Read tools
- Use Bash for read-only operations (ls, git status, git log, cat, etc.)
- Design and plan implementations without modifying any files

I can see this is a new git repository for a "Mileage Management System" (MMS) project with:
- A requirements document (RFQ.pdf)
- A statement of work (sow-mileage-management-system.md)
- Some configuration files (.claude_settings.json, .gitignore)

I'm ready to receive your requirements and begin exploring the codebase to create a detailed implementation plan. What would you like me to work on?
